query:
-- Check how many Zambrero site customers now have services assigned
SELECT c.externalId, c.name, COUNT(s.externalId) as service_count, SUM(s.monthlyRevenue) as total_revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId AND s.status = 'Active'
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Zambrero%'
GROUP BY c.externalId, c.name
ORDER BY c.name
LIMIT 20;
